name: task-pipeline
description: Full-cycle task delivery pipeline orchestrator for Claude Code.

plugins.name: task-pipeline
plugins.description: Thin orchestrator that runs a task through an intake grill + 9 gated stages (docs, brainstorm, spec, plan, subagent build, tests, lint/deploy, post-deploy, docs/wiki) with typed auto/manual gates, per-stage model reminders, a super-ux UX track for user-facing tasks, and toggleable project-configurable release automation. Built on the superpowers skills.
